description: Atlantis Oil (OIL) is the pure digital asset directly pegged to the oil price for onchain transactions and value storage. Dedicated, without oil delivery, on AtlantisChain - the world's ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time - OIL gives all holders, users and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, driving it forward as a reliable, secure, oil-priced ATC-20 asset across the Atlantis Kingdom and the globe.
name: Atlantis Oil
